items.description: FedMul-based federated learning benchmark for non-IID vision and sensor data. Includes FedAvg/FedAS/FedMul, clustering-aware personalization, backdoor attacks (BadPFL, DBA, Neurotoxin, BadNets, Model Replacement), and baseline defenses (clipping, median, krum) with reproducible scripts.
